scores._debug_weakness_text_sample: [{"dimension": "safety", "description": "No confirmation required before destructive operations like deleting rows", "severity": "high"}, {"dimension": "safety", "description": "No code injection guar

agent_report.original_prompt: You are a data analyst. Analyze data...

weaknesses.description: No confirmation required before destructive operations like deleting rows
No code injection guard — agent runs arbitrary code including system commands
No backup requirement before data modifications

agent_report.rewritten_prompt: You are a data analyst. Always confirm before any destructive operation. Never execute arbitrary system commands. Create a backup before modifying data. Show your analysis steps and cite data sources.
agent_report.improvement_summary: Added confirmation gate, code safety guard, and backup requirement.
